creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 244142
remmina-1.4.30 crashing: transcript

Wednesday 16th August: my first day on site at work for a few days. Packages were upgraded, whilst remmina-1.4.30 was locked, on Monday 14th. 

This morning: initial attempts to open a saved connection failed, as if there was no network connection, so I restarted the OS. 

Then, the first attempt to open the saved connection crashed the app. 

Ignoring (for a moment) the crypto lines in the backtrace, are these two lines relevant? 


[10:23:37:429] [8186:79615100] [ERROR][com.freerdp.common.settings] - [freerdp_settings_get_bool] Invalid key index 131
[10:23:37:429] [8186:79615100] [ERROR][com.freerdp.common.settings] - [freerdp_settings_get_bool] Invalid key index 0


Google finds a few matches, for example <https://gitlab.com/Remmina/Remmina/-/issues/2580> however the steps there differ, and so on.
